articles.title: Trump has found his Iran off-ramp – but at what cost?
articles.description: Domestically and internationally, the effects of the war will be felt for years to come.

topStories.title: What to know about Israel’s strikes on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Israel unleashed a massive bombardment on Israel a day after the US and Iran reached a ceasefire agreement.

topStories.title: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
topStories.description: An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin hit the duck, facing backlash from the community. "It didn't slow down or hesitate at all, just steamrolled right through," according to a witness.

topStories.title: Vance clarifies US-Iran ceasefire scope — ‘Iranians thought it included Lebanon, and it just didn’t’
topStories.description: “I think this comes from a legitimate misunderstanding. I think the Iranians thought that the ceasefire included Lebanon, and it just didn't,” Vance told reporters in Budapest.

topStories.title: Trump has found his Iran off-ramp – but at what cost?
topStories.description: Domestically and internationally, the effects of the war will be felt for years to come.

topStories.title: Shaky US-Iran Ceasefire In Doubt As Israeli Strikes Kill Over 180 In Lebanon
topStories.description: Iran War: Lebanon said at least 182 people were killed and hundreds were wounded, making it the deadliest day in the latest Israel-Hezbollah war.

topStories.title: JD Vance To Lead 1st Round Of US-Iran Talks In Pakistan: White House
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump is "dispatching his negotiating team", led by the Vice President of the United States, to Islamabad for talks this weekend.

topStories.title: ‘Shut down the business’: US company faces backlash over ‘earth usage fee’ on online orders
topStories.description: Outdoor brand Patagonia is facing online backlash after introducing an “earth usage fee” on orders in China. While the company says the move aims to reduce carbon emissions from high return rates, many users have slammed it as shifting responsibility onto customers.

topStories.title: JD Vance to lead US delegation to Pakistan for direct talks with Iran amid fragile ceasefire
topStories.description: “President Trump is dispatching his negotiating team led by the vice president of the United States, JD Vance, special envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner to Islamabad for talks this weekend,” Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

topStories.title: Netanyahu: A ‘ceasefire with Iran will not include Hezbollah’
topStories.description: Netanyahu says the US-Iran ceasefire “will not include Hezbollah,” in his first remarks after the ceasefire.

topStories.title: Choose Truce Or "Continue War Via Israel": Iran Warns US Over Lebanon Attacks
topStories.description: White House has dismissed the inclusion of Lebanon in the temporary ceasefire agreement, backing Israel's continued military operation against Hezbollah.

topStories.title: Election Commission-Trinamool Congress meeting ends on an acrimonious note
topStories.description: Trinamool delegation says Chief Election Commissioner told them to ‘get lost’, poll body sources say the Commission asked Rajya Sabha Member Derek O’Brien not to shout and ‘maintain decorum’

topStories.title: World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 254 people and wounded 1,165 others, according to Lebanon’s Civil Defence.

dailyNews.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 254 people and wounded 1,165 others, according to Lebanon’s Civil Defence.

dailyNews.title: Dragon does a Trump 'China made efforts to stop war'
dailyNews.description: China has stated it made "own efforts" to push for a ceasefire between the US and Iran, following reports of its pivotal role in brokering a two-week pause in hostilities. Foreign ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning detailed Beijing's diplomatic engagements aimed at deescalating regional tensions and achieving long-term stability.

dailyNews.title: Fed minutes show growing openness to rate hikes at March meeting
dailyNews.description: In recent meetings, Federal Reserve officials mulled the idea of increasing interest rates as inflation rates climbed beyond target thresholds, influenced in part by the intensifying U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran. Despite this, there is a strong expectation among many for rate cuts on the horizon.

dailyNews.title: Iran Accuses US Of Violating Key Clauses Of Peace Framework Before Talks
dailyNews.description: A fresh diplomatic row has erupted after Iranian officials accused the United States of violating three clauses of the 10-Point Proposal, the agreed framework for upcoming negotiations.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump’s ‘red line’ against Iran nuclear enrichment remains
dailyNews.description: Trump's spokesperson says Vice President JD Vance will lead US team for negotiations with Iran in Pakistan on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: 'Ketamine Queen' Jailed For 15 Years For Selling Drugs To Matthew Perry
dailyNews.description: Jasveen Sangha, 42, was one of five people charged over the death of the beloved Canadian-American actor.

dailyNews.title: Inside 15-Minute Meet Between Trinamool Congress And Poll Body Chief
dailyNews.description: The meeting lasted roughly 15 minutes but has resulted in a significant political controversy with sharply differing accounts from both sides.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance slams Zelenskyy’s comments about Hungary’s Orban
dailyNews.description: US vice president in Hungary calls Ukrainian leader's 'threatening' remarks 'completely scandalous'.

dailyNews.title: Trump backs Israel, says Lebanon a ‘separate skirmish’ after ceasefire
dailyNews.description: After Israeli strikes on Beirut, Donald Trump said Lebanon isn’t included in the Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s promise to ‘wipe out’ Iran could backfire on US power
dailyNews.description: The world counts down to Trump’s threats of destruction.

dailyNews.title: White House demands Iran reopen Strait of Hormuz immediately after closure claims
dailyNews.description: According to the White House, President Donald Trump expects the strait to remain open, and stressed that Tehran will be held accountable if it fails to ensure continued access for international shipping.

dailyNews.title: ‘A lot of work to do’ to reopen Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said more work is needed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Israel carries out large wave of air strikes across Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

topStories.title: Trump says Lebanon not part of US-Iran ceasefire, but ‘will get taken care of’ - Report
topStories.description: The comments come after Israel continued its strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon, even a day after the United States and Iran agreed to a two‑week ceasefire.

topStories.title: Pam Bondi won’t testify to House committee investigating Jeffrey Epstein next week, says Justice Department
topStories.description: The House Oversight Committee had subpoenaed Bondi on 17 March to testify as part of an investigation into the DOJ's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell cases. Donald Trump fired Bondi as the US Attorney General Pam on April 2, after just over a year in office.

topStories.description: Before a single term has been negotiated, Trump is claiming total victory over Iran, but is this really a win?

dailyNews.description: Before a single term has been negotiated, Trump is claiming total victory over Iran, but is this really a win?

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump says only one set of terms acceptable in US-Iran talks: ‘These are the POINTS…’
dailyNews.description: In his latest post on TRUTH Social, Trump said, “There is only one group of meaningful ‘POINTS’ that are acceptable to the United States…”

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Leavitt slaps down critics who called Trump's Iran threat a bluff
dailyNews.description: Karoline Leavitt says Trump's threat to destroy Iranian civilization was not a bluff, claiming it forced Iran to agree to a two-week ceasefire deal.

dailyNews.title: Schumer blasts Trump’s Iran war as failure, moves to rein in his war powers amid ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., plans to force another war powers vote to rein in President Donald Trump's use of the military in Iran amid a fragile ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Michael Moore calls Democratic Party 'cowards' who actually support Iran war
dailyNews.description: Michael Moore claimed Democratic Party leadership supports the Iran conflict after arguing President Donald Trump made a "holocaust" level threat against the country.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: What could the U.S. gain from Iran ceasefire?
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance will lead the first round of talks with Iran this weekend, the White House says. CBS News national security contributor Joe Zacks joins with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Dow surges more than 1,300 points as investors embrace Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Investors cheered the announcement of a two-week ceasefire, which President Trump said is contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt takes questions on Iran ceasefire, says Vance will lead negotiating team in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt took questions Wednesday about the ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran, shedding light on negotiations  between the two countries that will take place this weekend in Islamabad, Pakistan. Following the briefing, CBS News' Ed O'Keefe provided more insight.

dailyNews.title: What Is In Iran’s 10-Point Proposal, and How Does It Compare to U.S. Demands?
dailyNews.description: The plan, which reasserts Iran’s control of the Strait of Hormuz and maintains the country’s right to nuclear enrichment, is not the same as the one President Trump said was a “workable basis” for negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Has Trump Met His War Goals in Iran?
dailyNews.description: On the first day of the pause, Iran fired missiles and launched drones in the region. It said an oil refinery on Lavan Island had been attacked. Israel continued its strikes in Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: White House Secures Foreign Steel for Ballroom Project
dailyNews.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Investigating L.A. Schools’ Gender Disclosure Policies
dailyNews.description: The investigation into the nation’s second-largest school district was prompted by a lawsuit from parents who say the policies contributed to their child’s death.
